'''Zakul''' was a [[Sanyassan/Legends|Sanyassan]] Marauder and the new [[Warlord/Legends|King]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. He was one of the sons of [[Terak]], leader of the stranded [[Sanyassan Marauders]].<ref name="GatORW" />

When [[Terak|King Terak]] was [[Battle of Endor (Ewok–Sanyassan conflict)|killed]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="E:TBfE">''[[Ewoks: The Battle for Endor]]''</ref> [[General/Legends|General]] [[Yavid]] tried to take the Marauder [[Terak's Keep|throne]] and tried to become King. But [[Gender/Legends|he]] was not able to match Terak's feat of keeping order over such a rabble, and the Marauders turned on one another.<ref>{{DB|character|generalyavid|Yavid, General}}</ref> But eventually Zakul emerged victorious in this struggle, re-established order, and became the new King.<ref name="GatORW" />

Nevertheless, when the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] later sent [[Agent/Legends|agents]] to scout the Endorian forest, they found no trace of the Sanyassan Marauders.<ref name="FF10">{{FactFile|10|END 1-4|The Forest Moon of Endor}}</ref>

== Behind the scenes ==
The character of Zakul was first mentioned in the roleplaying game module [[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds|''Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds'']],<ref name="GatORW" /> published in [[March 24]], [[2004]].<ref>{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=products/swrpgacc/888870000|text=Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds}}</ref> His backstory after the events of [[Ewoks: The Battle for Endor|''Ewoks: The Battle for Endor'']]<ref name="E:TBfE" /> was indirectly mentioned in the module, as GMs whose campaigns set after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] could use Terak’s statistics for Zakul, indicating that he took power after his father.<ref name="GatORW" />
